project_type: TypeScript monorepo with 13 apps, 17 services, 37 packages using pnpm workspaces + Turborepo
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo 2.9.14. Turbo tasks: typecheck (depends on ^typecheck), build (depends on ^build, outputs dist/**), test (depends on ^build). No custom build pipeline beyond tsc per package.
test_framework: Vitest 2.x with coverage-v8. Test files: *.test.ts in src/__tests__/ or co-located. Some packages have no test script.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile  2. pnpm typecheck  3. pnpm build  4. pnpm test
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client generated in packages/database via 'prisma generate'. Output goes to node_modules/.prisma/client. No checked-in snapshots.
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @quant/database run build (generates Prisma client)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node 22 available. No Docker needed for typecheck/build. Prisma generate needs no database connection.
contribution_requirements: From KIRO_AUTONOMOUS_NEXT_PHASES_PROMPT.md: Do not weaken global strictness. Avoid mass 'as any'. Use explicit guards, non-empty checks, better types, safe defaults. Split test tsconfig from production build tsconfig where needed.
key_patterns: Packages use composite:true tsconfig with project references. Root tsconfig.json has strict:true, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess. Most errors are: (1) TS6305 missing dist output from referenced projects, (2) TS2532/TS18048 possibly undefined from noUncheckedIndexedAccess, (3) TS6133/TS6196 unused variables/imports.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 app frontends/backends), packages/ (37 shared libs), services/ (17 microservices), scripts/ (test.js, ml/). Each package: src/index.ts barrel, tsconfig.json extending root, package.json with scripts.
